Brothers Keepers.description: Canadian organized crime group based in British Columbia, founded in 2016 by Gavinder Singh Grewal. Engaged in drug trafficking, murder, and other crimes across Canada and internationally. Considered one of the most prominent and violent gangs in B.C. by the RCMP. Still active.

descriptions: Jamie Bacon condemned the Brothers' Keepers gang, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Bacon condemned the Wolfpack Alliance together with the Indo-Canadian Brothers' Keepers gang in racist and homophobic language.

descriptions: Bishnoi gang is listed as a rival of Brothers Keepers in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Red Scorpions , United Nations , Kang crime family(BIBO gang) , Bishnoi gang

descriptions: Bishnoi gang are listed as rivals in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bishnoi gang

descriptions: Clan del Golfo is listed as an ally of Brothers Keepers in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Clan del Golfo Independent Soldiers , Hells Angels , Driftwood Crips

descriptions: Clan del Golfo are listed as allies in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Clan del Golfo

descriptions: A member of Dhak-Duhre group switched allegiance to Brothers Keepers, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Jagdeep Cheema had once been an associate of Dhak group gangster Jujhar Khunkhun as well and was a member of the Dhak-Duhre group, a group which is closely allied with the UN gang; however, Cheema had allegedly switched allegiance to the Brothers Keepers/Wolfpack years ago.

descriptions: Driftwood Crips is listed as an ally of Brothers Keepers in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Clan del Golfo Independent Soldiers , Hells Angels , Driftwood Crips

descriptions: Driftwood Crips are aligned with and run drug lines for Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers also have a close relationship with the Driftwood Crips

descriptions: Grewal/Dhaliwal Crime Group leads the Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers are led by the Grewal/Dhaliwal Crime Group

descriptions: Hells Angels is listed as an ally of Brothers Keepers in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Clan del Golfo Independent Soldiers , Hells Angels , Driftwood Crips

descriptions: Brothers Keepers have a close alliance with Hells Angels, including its 'Hardside' Chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang also has a close alliance with the Hells Angels

descriptions: Independent Soldiers aligned themselves with Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: He and his crew of Troy McKinnon and Cody Sleigh were Independent Soldiers members, who, along with the rest of the Independent Soldiers gang and the Wolfpack alliance, would become rivals with the Red Scorpions and BIBO gang while aligning themselves with the Brothers Keepers gang.

descriptions: The two gangs are closely allied, with a long relationship through the Wolfpack.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers are currently closely allied to the Independent Soldiers

descriptions: Brothers Keepers are in conflict with Kang crime family as part of BIBO coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers are currently in conflict with the United Nations gang as well as the coalition of the Red Scorpions gang and Kang crime family, which is also known as the BIBO ( Blood In Blood Out ) gang.

descriptions: Kang crime family (BIBO gang) are listed as rivals in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Kang crime family(BIBO gang)

descriptions: Kang Crime Group splintered from Brothers Keepers and is at war with them.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kang Crime Group is known to be in a war with the Brothers Keepers for control of territory in Metro Vancouver.

descriptions: Brothers Keepers are in conflict with Red Scorpions as part of a coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers are currently in conflict with the United Nations gang as well as the coalition of the Red Scorpions gang and Kang crime family, which is also known as the BIBO ( Blood In Blood Out ) gang.

descriptions: Red Scorpions are listed as rivals in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Red Scorpions

descriptions: Brothers Keepers was formerly aligned with Red Scorpions.
edges.evidence_quote: Founded by Gavin Grewal with most of its members and leadership formerly aligned with the Red Scorpions.

descriptions: Brothers Keepers are in conflict with United Nations gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers are currently in conflict with the United Nations gang as well as the coalition of the Red Scorpions gang and Kang crime family, which is also known as the BIBO ( Blood In Blood Out ) gang.

descriptions: United Nations are listed as rivals in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: United Nations

descriptions: Brothers Keepers are in conflict with the United Nations gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The use of rap in the present underworld conflict between the Brothers Keepers vs. both the Kang group and the United Nations gang is new

descriptions: Wolfpack alliance aligned with Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: He and his crew of Troy McKinnon and Cody Sleigh were Independent Soldiers members, who, along with the rest of the Independent Soldiers gang and the Wolfpack alliance, would become rivals with the Red Scorpions and BIBO gang while aligning themselves with the Brothers Keepers gang.

descriptions: Brothers Keepers is listed as an ally of the AGC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, CJNG, Brothers Keepers, 'Ndrangheta, Sicilian Mafia, Los Choneros, Los Contrabandistas, Los Cachiros, Los Rastrojos

descriptions: Brothers Keepers is listed as an ally of the Clan del Golfo in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel , CJNG , Brothers Keepers , 'Ndrangheta , Sicilian Mafia , Los Choneros , Los Contrabandistas , Los Cachiros , Los Rastrojos

descriptions: Brothers Keepers listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brothers Keepers , Hells Angels , Mexican Mafia , Musitano crime family , Punjabi mafia , Redd Alert , Rizzuto crime family , Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brothers Keepers

descriptions: The Red Scorpions list Brothers Keepers as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brothers Keepers (BC, Alberta, Ontario)

descriptions: Redd Alert is affiliated with Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: Redd Alert are also affiliated with the Independent Soldiers and Brothers Keepers (gang), two organized crime gangs active across Canada's Western provinces and internationally.

descriptions: Brothers Keepers is listed as a rival of United Nations in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brothers Keepers

descriptions: Infobox lists Brothers Keepers as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Wolfpack Alliance , Red Scorpions , Brothers Keepers

descriptions: Brothers Keepers is listed as a rival of the United Nations.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Wolfpack Alliance, Red Scorpions, Brothers Keepers

Foster gang.description: A group of criminals active in South Africa in 1914, led by William Henry Foster. The gang committed robberies and murders in Johannesburg and the Rand area. After a police manhunt, all members including Foster's wife committed suicide in a cave standoff.

descriptions: Rasta City's main rival was Muslim City.
edges.evidence_quote: Their main rival used to be Muslim City

descriptions: Reccless Tigers is affiliated with West Side Asian Boyz.
edges.evidence_quote: The group is affiliated with the West Side Asian Boyz gang and high-ranking members have recently been arrested for murder.

Black Cobra.description: Black Cobra is a large immigrant street gang in Denmark, founded in 2000 in Roskilde. It operates in major Danish cities and parts of Sweden, with approximately 100 members. The gang engages in drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, and murder, and controls a youth gang called the Black Scorpions. Members identify by wearing black and white shirts with a cobra emblem.

descriptions: AK81 lists Black Cobra as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Immigrant gangs (especially the gang from Blågårdsplads): Black Cobra , Black Scorpions, Loyal to Familia , Black Jackets

descriptions: Infobox lists Black Cobra as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Cobra , Comanchero MC , Cossacks MC , Finks MC , Gremium MC , Gypsy Joker MC , Hells Angels MC , Kinfolk MC , Mongols MC , No Surrender MC , Notorious MC , Rebels MC , Red Devils MC , Rock Machine MC , Satudarah MC , Vagos MC

descriptions: Black Cobra is listed as a rival of Bandidos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Cobra, Comanchero MC, Cossacks MC, Finks MC, Gremium MC, Gypsy Joker MC, Hells Angels MC, Kinfolk MC, Mongols MC, No Surrender MC, Notorious MC, Rebels MC, Red Devils MC, Rock Machine MC, Satudarah MC, Vagos MC

descriptions: Bandidos and Black Cobra were in a violent conflict in Køge in early 2013.
edges.evidence_quote: A war between the Bandidos and the Black Cobra gang erupted in Køge after Oruc Türkoglu, a leading Black Cobra figure in the city, was wounded in a stabbing by Bandidos members on 29 January 2013.

descriptions: Black Cobra and AK81 are rivals per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: AK81 , X-Team , Bandidos , Chicanos , Hells Angels

descriptions: Black Cobra and Bandidos were in a war in 2013, later ended by a truce.
edges.evidence_quote: A war between the Black Cobra and Bandidos erupted in Køge after Oruc Türkoglu, a leading Black Cobra figure in the city, was stabbed and wounded on 29 January 2013.

descriptions: Black Cobra is associated with Black Army.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang has been associated with gangs such as the Black Scorpions and Black Army within Denmark

descriptions: Black Cobra and Black Ghost are allies per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Army , Black Scorpions , M16 , Black Ghost , Black Spider , Black Jackets

descriptions: Black Cobra and Black Jackets are allies per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Army , Black Scorpions , M16 , Black Ghost , Black Spider , Black Jackets

descriptions: Black Cobra controls the Black Scorpions youth gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang also control a youth gang called the Black Scorpions.

descriptions: Black Cobra and Black Spider are allies per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Army , Black Scorpions , M16 , Black Ghost , Black Spider , Black Jackets

descriptions: Black Cobra and Chicanos are rivals per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: AK81 , X-Team , Bandidos , Chicanos , Hells Angels

descriptions: Black Cobra and Hells Angels are rivals engaged in gang warfare since 2007.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang's main rival is the Hells Angels, as in 2007 there was a rise in gang warfare between the two gangs, stemming from conflict over control of the drug and prostitution trade.

descriptions: Black Cobra and M16 are allies per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Army , Black Scorpions , M16 , Black Ghost , Black Spider , Black Jackets

descriptions: Black Cobra has rivalry with Vaerebros.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang has been associated with gangs such as the Black Scorpions and Black Army within Denmark, and have seen to have rivalry with Danish gangs such as the Hells Angels and Bandidos motorcycle gangs, and the Vaerebros.

descriptions: Black Cobra and X-Team are rivals per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: AK81 , X-Team , Bandidos , Chicanos , Hells Angels

descriptions: Chicanos and Black Cobra had a conflict in Sweden.
edges.evidence_quote: The Chicanos in Dalsland became involved in a conflict with the Black Cobra gang after attempting to recruit Black Cobra members.

descriptions: Freikorps veterans joined Organisation Consul after the Kapp Putsch.
edges.evidence_quote: Some Freikorps veterans drifted into the ultra-nationalist Organisation Consul

descriptions: Nazi Lowriders recruited Insane White Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1993, the gang Insane White Boys (IWB) was incepted in Orange County and came into prominence being recruited by the Nazi Lowriders as well.

descriptions: Insane White Boys is subservient to Nazi Lowriders.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of these Peckerwood gangs in California are subservient to the authority of Nazi Lowriders, which includes the punk gangs Vicious Circle and La Mirada Punks, as well as Insane White Boys, Independent Skins, Orange County Skins, and a rigid alliance with Southern California Skinhead Alliance (SoCal Skins).

Varrio Nuevo Estrada.description: Chicano criminal street gang founded in the 1940s in the Estrada Courts housing projects of Boyle Heights, Los Angeles. One of the most prominent Hispanic gangs in east Los Angeles, involved in murder, drug trafficking, and other crimes. Operates under the Sureño banner in prison and has ties to the Mexican Mafia. Still active despite a 2004 gang injunction.

descriptions: Varrio Nuevo Estrada has historical ties to the Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: They have old ties to the Mexican Mafia

descriptions: Varrio Nuevo Estrada aligns with the Sureños in prison.
edges.evidence_quote: unite under the Sureño banner in the California Prison System despite rivalries

descriptions: White Fence is listed as a rival of Varrio Nuevo Estrada in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: White Fence

descriptions: Varrio Nuevo Estrada is a rival of White Fence.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: All Maravilla sets, Varrio Nuevo Estrada , Armenian Power

descriptions: Zoe Pound expanded after the decline of John Does.
edges.evidence_quote: Zoe Pound took advantage of the power vacuum caused by their sudden decline

V7 - AntiBala.description: Brazilian criminal organization based in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, founded in 2013 by André Vilmar Azevedo de Souza ("Nego André") as a coalition to rival the Bala na Cara (BNC) faction. Engaged in drug trafficking, homicides, and robberies, with a strong presence in the southern zone of Porto Alegre. Known for violent conflicts with BNC and Os Manos, contributing to a period of high violence in the state.

descriptions: Bala na Cara and V7 are in a violent conflict that started in 2016 after a kidnapping and murder.
edges.evidence_quote: Com o crescimento da Bala na Cara , surgiu a facção V7 , que passou a tentar atrasar sua expansão. O conflito entre essas duas facções teve início em 2016, após o sequestro de Jeferson Lapuente , um integrante da BNC.

descriptions: Infobox lists V7 as a rival of Os Manos.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: V7 was created to oppose Bala na Cara, establishing a rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: Sua criação tinha como objetivo enfrentar a facção rival Bala na Cara (BNC) na região.

descriptions: V7 declared war on Bala na Cara in 2016, escalating the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Em 2016, os V7 declararam guerra à Bala na Cara (BNC), após o sequestro e execução de Jeferson Lapuente, um membro da Bala na Cara.

descriptions: Os Aberto was involved in the same war as V7, but the text does not specify whether they were allies or enemies of V7.
edges.evidence_quote: Entre 2016 e 2017, a guerra entre as facções V7, BNC, Os Manos e Os Aberto resultou em aproximadamente 400 mortes

descriptions: V7 and Os Manos initially had a non-aggression pact, but later went to war over unpaid debts.
edges.evidence_quote: Os V7 entraram em guerra contra Os Manos por conta de dividas que não foram pagas, no inicio as duas facções tinham um acordo de 'não se agredir', estando neutra uma a outra, mas por conta das dividas e dos desacertos romperam o acordo.

descriptions: V7 and Os Manos had a non-aggression pact initially.
edges.evidence_quote: no inicio as duas facções tinham um acordo de 'não se agredir', estando neutra uma a outra

La Unión Tepito.description: Mexican criminal cartel based in Tepito, Mexico City, founded in 2009 under the tutelage of Edgar Valdez Villarreal (La Barbie). Its first leader was Francisco Javier Hernández Gómez (Pancho Cayagua), executed in 2017. The cartel engages in drug trafficking, kidnapping, extortion, and homicide, operating primarily in the Mexico City metropolitan area. It is currently active and has alliances with the CJNG.

descriptions: Unión Tepito is listed as an enemy of Cártel de Tláhuac in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Grupos Criminales: , Los Rodolfos Unión Tepito , Cartel de Sinaloa

descriptions: Fuerza Anti-Unión formed from a split of Unión Tepito members, leading to territorial competition.
edges.evidence_quote: varios miembros de la organización se separaron para formar la Fuerza Anti Unión, lo que orillo la competencia de ambos grupos por el control del territorio

descriptions: CJNG is fighting La Unión Tepito for Mexico City.
edges.evidence_quote: The CJNG are fighting ... La Unión Tepito for Mexico City

descriptions: CJNG is fighting La Unión Tepito for control of Mexico City.
edges.evidence_quote: La Unión Tepito for Mexico City

descriptions: CJNG fights La Unión Tepito for Mexico City.
edges.evidence_quote: La Unión Tepito for Mexico City

descriptions: Infobox lists Unión Tepito as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Unión Tepito

descriptions: CJNG considers Unión Tepito an enemy per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Unión Tepito

descriptions: The infobox lists Unión Tepito as an enemy of CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Gobierno de México, Gobierno Federal de los Estados Unidos, Ejército Zapatista de Liberación Nacional, Grupos criminales : , Grupo Flechas, Cártel del Noreste, Cártel de Guasave, Cártel Nueva Plaza, Guerreros Unidos, Artistas Asesinos, Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima, La Familia Michoacana, Los Caballeros Templarios, Los Talibanes, Unión Tepito, Cártel de los Soles, Los Choneros

descriptions: Infobox lists La Unión Tepito as a rival.

descriptions: La Unión Tepito is listed as a rival of La Familia Michoacana in the infobox.

descriptions: Infobox lists Cártel de Tláhuac as an enemy of Unión Tepito.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Cártel de Tláhuac

descriptions: Unión Tepito considers Cártel de Tláhuac an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Cártel de Tláhuac

descriptions: Fuerza Anti-Unión is a splinter group that broke away from La Unión Tepito in 2016 due to a conflict, and they are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Fuerza Anti-Unión (a notorious splinter group from La Unión Tepito who broke away from them in 2016 after the founder of Fuerza Anti-Unión, Jorge Flores Concha (aka "El Tortas") had one of his brothers murdered at the behest of "El Betito" (the leader of La Unión Tepito at the time of the crime) and the other kidnapped).

descriptions: Infobox lists Fuerza Anti-Unión as an enemy of Unión Tepito.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Fuerza Anti-Unión

descriptions: La Unión Tepito considers CJNG a major national enemy.

edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: CJNG

descriptions: Unión Tepito and CJNG are allies.

descriptions: La Unión Tepito considers La Familia Michoacana a major national enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: their biggest enemies are the Jalisco New Generation Cartel (CJNG), the Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Los Malcriados 3AD is listed as an ally of La Unión Tepito in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Luis Angel López Orea, alias El Pollo, líder de la célula delictiva "Los Sinaloas", ligadas a la Unión

descriptions: Los Tanzanios is listed as an ally of La Unión Tepito in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Kilos , Los Tanzanios , Los Malcriados 3AD

descriptions: La Unión Tepito considers Sinaloa Cartel a major national enemy.

descriptions: La Unión Tepito and Tláhuac Cartel are enemies and rivals for territory in Mexico City.
edges.evidence_quote: their main rivals within Mexico City are the Tláhuac Cartel (who have been enemies of La Union Tepito for more than a decade)

descriptions: Infobox lists Unión Tepito as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Unión Tepito

edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Unión Tepito

edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación, Cartel del Norte del Valle, FARC-EP, Cártel de Cali, Unión Tepito

descriptions: Tren de Aragua is a rival of certain cells of La Unión Tepito.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... La Unión Tepito (certain cells)

descriptions: Tren de Aragua lists certain cells of La Unión Tepito as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Oficina, Clan del Golfo, FARC dissidents, ELN, Los Tiguerones (until November 2023), Latin Kings [ unreliable source? ], La Unión Tepito (certain cells), Fuerza Anti-Unión, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Tren de Aragua is allied with La Unión Tepito.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... La Unión Tepito

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Venezuela (via the Cartel of the Suns, alleged by the US government), Primeiro Comando da Capital, Comando Vermelho, La Empresa, La Linea, La Unión Tepito, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Los Tiguerones (from November 2023), Los Lobos

edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Unión Tepito

edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Unión Tepito

edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Primeiro Comando da Capital , Tren del Llano , Mafia Rusa , Cosa Nostra , Mara Salvatrucha , Unión Tepito

descriptions: Tren de Aragua lists Unión Tepito as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Unión Tepito

descriptions: PETA challenged the power of local gangs (preman).
edges.evidence_quote: the underworld's position was challenged indirectly by the Japanese's construction of a rival institution in the form of Pembela Tanah Air (PETA)

descriptions: The south side Popes hated the Two-Six, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: the south side branch, who hated the Satan Disciples and Two-Six gangs

descriptions: Two Six listed as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sureños, 12st Players, Almighty Bishops, 4GMz, SVLz, Latin Kings, Two Six, 22Boys, Almighty Ambrose, La Raza, Satan Disciples, Krazy Getdown Boys, Imperial Gangsters, Maniac Latin Disciples, Spanish Gangster Disciples, Insane Deuces, Folk Nation

descriptions: The Abdel-Kader family cooperates with Jewish crime families, including the Shirazi crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Clans like Tayibe based Abdel-Kader family are involved in extortion, drug and weapon trafficking, fraud as well as money laundering, often in cooperation with their Jewish counterparts.

descriptions: Hezbollah and Free Patriotic Movement signed a memorandum of understanding in 2006, forming an alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2006, Michel Aoun and Hassan Nasrallah met in Mar Mikhayel Church, Chiyah, and signed a memorandum of understanding between Free Patriotic Movement and Hezbollah organising their relation and discussing Hezbollah's disarmament with some conditions.

descriptions: The Strangio collaborated with the Ieraci-Petullà in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º luglio 2008 termina l'operazione Alba e tramonto ... con 27 arresti di affiliati alle cosche Ieraci-Petullà ... in collaborazione anche con appartenenti ai Nirta-Strangio.

'Ndrina Strangio.description: A powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Luca, Calabria, Italy. Historical rivals of the Pelle 'ndrina, they are known for the Duisburg massacre in 2007. Involved in drug trafficking, ship sinkings, and a long-running feud with the Pelle-Vottari clan. The organization remains active.

descriptions: Strangio clan is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: large quantities of heroin and cocaine had been purchased by the Pesce - Bellocco clan from Rosarno and the Strangio clan from San Luca

descriptions: Bellocco and Nirta-Strangio were both targeted in the same operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: 10 marzo 2011 si conclude dopo 3 anni l'operazione Imelda ... con 31 arresti ... nei confronti delle famiglie Nirta-Strangio , Bellocco- Ascone e altre 'ndrine accusati di traffico internazionale di droga.

descriptions: The Giorgi are allied with the Strangio (janchi).
edges.evidence_quote: insieme agli Strangio , detti janchi

descriptions: After 1995, Strangio allied with the Scalzone (La Maggiore).
edges.evidence_quote: Invece si alleano con i Scalzone gli Strangio , detti janchi, e quelli detti barbari

descriptions: La Maggiore is distinct from Nirta-Strangio, but both are mentioned as separate entities.
edges.evidence_quote: La Maggiore o Scalzone si distingue dai Nirta-Strangio di San Luca , alleati dei Giorgi .

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Strangio.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: The two clans were engaged in a violent feud (San Luca feud) that started in 1991 and escalated in Germany in 2007.
edges.evidence_quote: A war between the two 'Ndrangheta clans Pelle-Romeo (Pelle-Vottari) and Strangio-Nirta from San Luca that had started in 1991 in their home town in Calabria and resulted in several deaths, spilled into Germany in 2007; six men were shot dead in front of an Italian restaurant in Duisburg on 15 August 2007.

descriptions: Nirta-Strangio 'ndrina is a rival of Pelle 'ndrina according to the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Nirta-Strangio 'ndrina

descriptions: The Pelle and Nirta-Strangio 'ndrine were engaged in a violent feud (faida) starting in 1991.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida di San Luca è la guerra nata fra le cosche dei Nirta-Strangio e Pelle-Vottari nel periodo pasquale del 1991.

descriptions: The Petullà (Ieraci-Petullà) collaborated with Nirta-Strangio in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º luglio 2008 termina l'operazione Alba e tramonto della polizia di Reggio Calabria e Polistena con 27 arresti di affiliati alle cosche Ieraci-Petullà di Cinquefrondi e Squillace di Polistena in collaborazione anche con appartenenti ai Nirta-Strangio.

descriptions: Romeo and Nirta-Strangio were both targeted in the same operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione European 'ndrangheta connection ... colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari , dei Romeo, detti Stacchi , degli Cua-Ietto , degli Ursino e dei Nirta-Strangio

descriptions: The Squillace and Nirta-Strangio collaborated in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º luglio 2008 termina l'operazione Alba e tramonto della polizia di Reggio Calabria e Polistena con 27 arresti di affiliati alle cosche Ieraci-Petullà di Cinquefrondi e Squillace di Polistena in collaborazione anche con appartenenti ai Nirta-Strangio.

descriptions: The Strangio and Bellocco-Ascone were involved together in international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 10 marzo 2011 si conclude ... l'operazione Imelda ... con 31 arresti ... nei confronti delle famiglie Nirta-Strangio, Bellocco - Ascone ... accusati di traffico internazionale di droga.

descriptions: The Strangio supplied cocaine to the Torcasio-Gualtieri-Cerra group.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 31 gennaio 2017 si conclude l'operazione Dioniso ... con cocaina fornita dagli Strangio di San Luca.

descriptions: The Strangio and Cua-Ietto were targeted together in the same operation, suggesting cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione European 'ndrangheta connection ... che colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari, dei Romeo detti Stacchi, degli Cua-Ietto, degli Ursino e dei Nirta-Strangio

descriptions: The Strangio and Giorgi were targeted together in the same operation, suggesting cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 13 aprile 2016: Operazione Colombiani d'Aspromonte contro i Nirta-Strangio, i Giorgi, i Violi e gli Italiano.

descriptions: The Strangio are suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Iamonte.
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ... con la 'ndrina Iamonte

descriptions: The Strangio collaborated with the Ieraci-Petullà in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º luglio 2008 termina l'operazione Alba e tramonto ... con 27 arresti di affiliati alle cosche Ieraci-Petullà ... in collaborazione anche con appartenenti ai Nirta-Strangio.

descriptions: The Strangio and Italiano were targeted together in the same operation, suggesting cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 13 aprile 2016: Operazione Colombiani d'Aspromonte contro i Nirta-Strangio, i Giorgi, i Violi e gli Italiano.

descriptions: The Strangio are suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Nirta (La Maggiore).
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ai ... Nirta (La Maggiore)

descriptions: Members of the Mammoliti were arrested with Strangio members for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 6 marzo 2009 vengono arrestati ... Antonio e Domenico Pizzata, dei Mammoliti detti i fischianti, che gestivano un traffico di droga tra Milano e San Luca.

descriptions: The Strangio are suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Muto.
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ai ... Muto di Cetraro

descriptions: Nirta-Strangio and Pelle-Vottari were in a faida (feud) in San Luca.
edges.evidence_quote: Nell'agosto 2007 è ritornata sotto i riflettori la faida di San Luca tra le cosche Nirta-Strangio e Pelle-Vottari dopo la strage di Ferragosto nel ristorante italiano Da Bruno a Duisburg in Germania (6 persone uccise).

descriptions: Nirta-Strangio and Pelle-Vottari were opposing sides in the Faida di San Luca.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di San Luca : scoppiata nel 1991, ha visto contrapposte le 'ndrine dei Nirta-Strangio e quelle dei Pelle-Vottari

descriptions: The Strangio are historical rivals of the Pelle 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivali storici della potentissima 'ndrina Pelle

descriptions: The Pizzata killed a Strangio associate, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 24 gennaio 2013 viene trovato morto ... Vincenzo Femia, referente dei Nirta nella capitale. Autore dell'omicidio la cosca dei Pizzata.

descriptions: The Strangio and Romeo (Stacchi) were targeted together in the same operation, suggesting cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione European 'ndrangheta connection ... che colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari, dei Romeo detti Stacchi, degli Cua-Ietto, degli Ursino e dei Nirta-Strangio

descriptions: The Strangio collaborated with the Squillace in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º luglio 2008 termina l'operazione Alba e tramonto ... con 27 arresti di affiliati alle cosche ... Squillace di Polistena in collaborazione anche con appartenenti ai Nirta-Strangio.

descriptions: The Strangio and Ursino were targeted together in the same operation, suggesting cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione European 'ndrangheta connection ... che colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari, dei Romeo detti Stacchi, degli Cua-Ietto, degli Ursino e dei Nirta-Strangio

descriptions: The Strangio and Violi were targeted together in the same operation, suggesting cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 13 aprile 2016: Operazione Colombiani d'Aspromonte contro i Nirta-Strangio, i Giorgi, i Violi e gli Italiano.

descriptions: The Strangio had an alliance with Sardinian criminal groups for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Dall'indagine Santa Barbara del 2005 si è scoperta un'alleanza fra i Nirta e la criminalità sarda di Cagliari, Nuoro e Oristano per il traffico di cocaina ed eroina.

descriptions: The Strangio and Turkish criminal groups were targeted together in the same operation, suggesting cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione European 'ndrangheta connection ... che colpisce alcuni esponenti ... dei Nirta-Strangio nonché esponenti della criminalità turca.

descriptions: The Strangio are suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Musitano.
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ai Musitano di Platì

descriptions: Strangio supplied cocaine to Torcasio.
edges.evidence_quote: cocaina fornita dagli Strangio di San Luca

descriptions: The Ursino were targeted alongside the Nirta-Strangio in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione “European 'ndrangheta connection” (ex Pollino ) ... che colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari , dei Romeo detti Stacchi , degli Cua-Ietto , degli Ursino e dei Nirta-Strangio

edges.target: Partido Comunista de Colombia - Marxista Leninista
descriptions: EPL was the armed wing of the Partido Comunista de Colombia - Marxista Leninista.
edges.evidence_quote: se constituyó como el brazo armado del Partido Comunista de Colombia - Marxista Leninista

edges.target: Partido Comunista de Colombia - Marxista Leninista
descriptions: EPL was the military wing of PCdeC-ML.
edges.evidence_quote: El EPL era el brazo militar del Partido Comunista de Colombia - Marxista Leninista

descriptions: Perez-Iodice formed from the ranks of Buonerba.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo l'arresto di Buonerba si afferma un nuovo clan mazzarelliano in contrasto con la Paranza dei Bambini, i "Perez-Iodice", nato appunto dalle file dei Buonerba.

descriptions: Perez-Iodice is a new Mazzarella-affiliated clan formed from Buonerba ranks.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo l'arresto di Buonerba si afferma un nuovo clan mazzarelliano in contrasto con la Paranza dei Bambini, i "Perez-Iodice", nato appunto dalle file dei Buonerba.

descriptions: The Fruit Belt Gang is the direct opposition to the Central Park Gang, indicating a rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: Fruit Belt Gang also known as the Fruit Belt Posse , is a street gang based in Buffalo, New York in the Fruit Belt area and is the direct opposition to the Central Park Gang.

edges.source: Federal Political Negotiation and Consultative Committee
descriptions: Shan State Army – North was a founding member of FPNCC.
edges.evidence_quote: In April 2017, the Northern Alliance, along with three other EAOs (the United Wa State Army, National Democratic Alliance Army, and the Shan State Army – North), formed the Federal Political Negotiation and Consultative Committee.

descriptions: SSA-N was formed by SSPP as its armed wing.
edges.evidence_quote: The SSPP later formed the pro-communist Shan State Army – North (SSA-N) to continue the insurgency.

descriptions: UWSA cut off weapons and financial aid to Shan State Army - North.
edges.evidence_quote: the UWSA declared that they would no longer provide weapons or financial aid to the TNLA, MNDAA, and Shan State Army - North

descriptions: Deptford Ghetto Boys is a regional subset of Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: they also formed regional subsets such as the Deptford Ghetto Boys

edges.source: Movement for the Emancipation of the Niger Delta
descriptions: JRC unites MEND, RNDPVF, and MB for common action.
edges.evidence_quote: JRC : Formado en enero de 2006, grupo armado que trata de agrupar y la acción común de los distintos grupos guerrilleros, agrupa al MEND, al RNDPVF y a la MB

descriptions: Brussels Islamic State terror cell was part of the Islamic State until 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: Brussels Islamic State terror cell (until 2016)

descriptions: Brussels Islamic State terror cell is listed as a group of Islamic State in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: ... Brussels Islamic State terror cell

descriptions: Brussels Islamic State terror cell was part of IS until 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: ... Brussels Islamic State terror cell (until 2016)
